title: GSR 622 (E) Regarding extension of tenure of Justice Shri S. B. Sakrikar, Commissioner
description: GSR 622 (E) Regarding extension of tenure of Justice Shri S. B. Sakrikar, Commissioner
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3--Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 398] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, JULY 20,2000/ASADHA 29,1922 MINISTRY OF CHEMICALS AND FERTILIZERS {Department of Chemicals and petrochemicals) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th July, 2000 G.S.R. 622(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 6 of the Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Processing of claims) Act, 1985 (21 of 1985), the Centra! Government hereby appoints Justice Shri S. B. Sakrikar, sitting Judge of the High Court of Madhya Pradesh to hold concurrent charge of the post of Commissioner for the Welfare of the Victims of Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster, for a further period of one year with effect on and from the 15th September 1999 (afternoon). This is in continuation of this Department's notification No. GSR 764 (E) dated the 18th December, 1998. [File No. 21/27/95-B.Cell] SHANTANU CONSUL, Jt. Secy 1991 GI/2000 Printed by the Manager,Govt of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and published by the C o n t r o l l e r of Publications.
